_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA cert fixture grounded in Wildberger (2005) Divine Proportions ISBN 978-0-9757492-0-8 (Plato subfamily e=1) and Hardy+Wright (2008) ISBN 978-0-19-921986-5 Ch.III (Ford circles/Farey). -->
description: Plato chain (e=1): (1,1)...(6,1). Farey-adjacent since |b*(1)-(b+1)*(1)|=1. Curvatures all 2*1^2=2 (uniform). Ford circles at integer positions.
